channel.title: Peace Economics, Peace Science and Public Policy
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Peace Economics, Peace Science and Public Policy

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Ourania Dimitraki, Kyriakos Emmanouilidis, Alban Asllani DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/peps-2024-frontmatter4

item.title: The Economic Impact of Arms Spending in Germany, Italy, and Spain
item.description: Article by Ourania Dimitraki, Kyriakos Emmanouilidis, Alban Asllani DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/peps-2024-0019

item.title: Defense Burden Sharing and Military Cooperation in the EU27: A Descriptive Analysis (2002–2023)
item.description: Article by Ourania Dimitraki, Kyriakos Emmanouilidis, Alban Asllani DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/peps-2024-0050

item.title: Is Geopolitical Risk a Reason or Excuse for Bigger Military Expenditures?
item.description: Article by Ourania Dimitraki, Kyriakos Emmanouilidis, Alban Asllani DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/peps-2024-0027

item.title: Asymmetric and Threshold Effect of Military Expenditure on Economic Growth: Insight from an Emerging Market
item.description: Article by Ourania Dimitraki, Kyriakos Emmanouilidis, Alban Asllani DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/peps-2023-0067

item.title: Examining the Military Spending Economic Growth Nexus in the Presence of Informality: Evidence from the Balkan Peninsula
item.description: Article by Ourania Dimitraki, Kyriakos Emmanouilidis, Alban Asllani DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/peps-2024-0029
